name: The Great Zalmoxis, Mind-Reader (Allegedly)
type: Legendary Acorn Creature — Human Fortune Teller
text:
When The Great Zalmoxis enters the battlefield, predict out loud a number from 1 to 6. Then any opponent rolls a six-sided die. If you guessed right, draw two cards and bask. If you guessed wrong, claim 'the spirits were loud today' and draw one anyway.
{T}: Name a card. The player to your right says whether it's in their hand. They may lie. You may not check.
flavorText: He's never been wrong, because he's never agreed on what 'right' means.

extras.fourthWall: predict a number out loud; opponents may bluff
